category_sources: Official Agner Fog objconv manual describes converting and modifying object files, libraries, and disassembling object and executable files.
source_facts.description says it is an object file converter.
display_name_sources: Official manual and homepage use objconv for the object file converter.
docs_sources: Official Agner Fog PDF is the instructions manual for objconv.
Official optimize page has the Object file converter section and download.
repo_sources: No official source-control project URL was identified; third-party GitHub mirrors were rejected.
source_facts.repo is empty and source_facts.source-archive points to the official objconv.zip source archive, not a source-control repository.
tags_sources: Official manual describes converting object files and libraries, modifying symbols, dumping, and disassembling x86 and x86-64 files.
source_facts.description identifies an object file converter.
